description: Known vs. unknown referent contrast for E1 (entity-knowledge direction), ~40/40. KNOWN items are cloze prompts whose next token is a single high-probability factual answer (scored on its first token, leading space). UNKNOWN items are fictional / private / false-premise referents with no truthful continuation. On the -it model the experiment uses an assistant-prefill readout (see entity_knowledge.RECALL_INSTRUCTION): the stem prefills the model turn so the answer is the immediate continuation. Keep the cloze shape; KNOWN answers MUST be a single space-prefixed token (verified) or the preflight warns.
